name: layouts-calendar
title: Calendar
description: Full-featured week/day view with event drag + resize, multi-day events, mini-calendar sidebar, command menu, and rich keyboard shortcuts.

files.content:

import type { ViewType } from "@/components/layouts/calendar/week-view-types"; /** Reusable "Soon" badge for unimplemented command items */ const SOON_BADGE = ( Soon ); interface CommandMenuProps { open: boolean; onOpenChange: (open: boolean) => void; onGoToToday: () => void; onGoToPrev: () => void; onGoToNext: () => void; onSwitchView: (view: ViewType) => void; onToggleLeftSidebar: () => void; onToggleRightSidebar: () => void; onCycleTheme: () => void; } export function CommandMenu({ open, onOpenChange, onGoToToday, onGoToPrev, onGoToNext, onSwitchView, onToggleLeftSidebar, onToggleRightSidebar, onCycleTheme, }: CommandMenuProps) { const runCommand = React.useCallback( (command: () => void) => { onOpenChange(false); command(); }, [onOpenChange], ); return ( No results found. {/* ── Calendar ── */} Create event... {SOON_BADGE} Meet with... {SOON_BADGE} Show teammate calendar... {SOON_BADGE} Create recurring scheduling link... {SOON_BADGE} Create one-off scheduling link... {SOON_BADGE} {/* ── Navigation ── */} Go to date... {SOON_BADGE} runCommand(onGoToToday)}> Go to today T runCommand(onGoToNext)}> Go to next week J runCommand(onGoToPrev)}> Go to previous week K Search events {SOON_BADGE} {/* ── Time zones ── */} Travel to time zone... {SOON_BADGE} Show additional time zones... {SOON_BADGE} {/* ── App ── */} runCommand(onToggleLeftSidebar)}> Toggle sidebar ⌘ / runCommand(onCycleTheme)}> Set theme... ⌘ ⇧ L {/* ── View ── */} Start week on... {SOON_BADGE} runCommand(() => onSwitchView("day"))}> Display day view D runCommand(() => onSwitchView("week"))}> Display week view W runCommand(() => onSwitchView("month"))}> Display month view M Set number of displayed days... {SOON_BADGE} Select all visible {SOON_BADGE} Default hour size {SOON_BADGE} Zoom hours in {SOON_BADGE} Zoom hours out {SOON_BADGE} Hide weekends {SOON_BADGE} Hide declined events {SOON_BADGE} Hide week numbers {SOON_BADGE} {/* ── Settings & help ── */} Get CalendarCN mobile app {SOON_BADGE} Show keyboard shortcuts {SOON_BADGE} Go to settings {SOON_BADGE} Support & feedback {SOON_BADGE} {/* ── Accounts ── */} Add Google Calendar account {SOON_BADGE} Manage calendar accounts {SOON_BADGE} Log out {SOON_BADGE} {/* ── CalendarCN ── */} Check for update {SOON_BADGE} About CalendarCN {SOON_BADGE} {/* ── Panels ── */} runCommand(onToggleRightSidebar)}> Toggle context panel /

"use client"; import { BadgeCheck, Bell, ChevronsUpDown, CreditCard, LogOut, Sparkles, } from "lucide-react"; import { Avatar, AvatarFallback, AvatarImage } from "@/components/ui/avatar"; import { DropdownMenu, DropdownMenuContent, DropdownMenuGroup, DropdownMenuItem, DropdownMenuLabel, DropdownMenuSeparator, DropdownMenuTrigger, } from "@/components/ui/dropdown-menu"; import { SidebarMenu, SidebarMenuButton, SidebarMenuItem, useSidebar, } from "@/components/ui/sidebar"; export function NavUser({ user, }: { user: { name: string; email: string; avatar: string; }; }) { const { isMobile } = useSidebar(); return ( VN
{user.name} {user.email}

import type {
  CalendarEvent,
  EventColor,
  EventReminder,
} from "@/components/layouts/calendar/week-view-types";

function d(month: number, day: number, hour: number, minute = 0): Date {
  return new Date(2026, month - 1, day, hour, minute);
}

function dy(
  year: number,
  month: number,
  day: number,
  hour: number,
  minute = 0,
): Date {
  return new Date(year, month - 1, day, hour, minute);
}

interface EventOpts {
  isAllDay?: boolean;
  description?: string;
  location?: string;
  timezone?: string;
  recurrence?: string;
  reminders?: EventReminder[];
  status?: "busy" | "free";
  visibility?: "default" | "public" | "private";
  calendarEmail?: string;
}

function ev(
  id: string,
  title: string,
  start: Date,
  end: Date,
  color: EventColor,
  calendarId: string,
  opts?: EventOpts,
): CalendarEvent {
  return { id, title, start, end, color, calendarId, ...opts };
}

/**
 * Generates mock events with fixed dates across January–March 2026.
 *
 * Calendar mapping:
 *   you@example.com       → red     (main email)
 *   Work               → blue    (work projects)
 *   Personal           → purple  (personal)
 *   Family             → orange  (family)
 *   Side Projects      → yellow  (side projects)
 *   Fitness            → green   (gym/sports)
 *   Holidays in Brazil → green   (subscribed)
 */
